test.name: Conformance Classes - Core + SystemFeatures + Common + Subsystems + Procedures + Deployments (OGC 23-001 /conf/core, /conf/system, /conf/subsystem, /conf/procedure, /conf/deployment; OGC 19-072 /conf/common)

test-method.name: conformancePageReturnsHttp200
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: GET /conformance returns HTTP 200 (REQ-ETS-CORE-003, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageReturnsJson
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance body is parseable JSON (REQ-ETS-CORE-003, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageHasConformsToArray
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance body has non-empty conformsTo array, captured into suite context (REQ-ETS-CORE-003, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageDeclaresCsCore
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/conf/core: /conformance declares the CS API Core conformance class URI (REQ-ETS-CORE-003)

test-method.name: deploymentsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/resources-endpoint: GET /deployments returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-RESOURCES-001)

exception.message: Method DeploymentsTests.deploymentsCollectionReturns200()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.deployments.DeploymentsTests@1af43a8a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: deploymentDeployedSystemEncodingDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/deployed-system-resource: IUT /conformance declares at least one encoding class providing DeployedSystem representation (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-DEPLOYED-SYSTEM-001 — UNIQUE-to-Deployments)

exception.message: Method DeploymentsTests.deploymentDeployedSystemEncodingDeclared()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.deployments.DeploymentsTests@1af43a8a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: deploymentItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/canonical-endpoint: GET /deployments/{id} has id+type+links per canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-CANONICAL-001)

exception.message: Method DeploymentsTests.deploymentItemHasIdTypeLinks()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.deployments.DeploymentsTests@1af43a8a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: deploymentItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/canonical-url: /deployments/{id} links contain rel=canonical (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-CANONICAL-URL-001)

exception.message: Method DeploymentsTests.deploymentItemHasCanonicalLink()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.deployments.DeploymentsTests@1af43a8a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: subsystemsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/subsystem/collection: GET /systems/{parentId}/subsystems returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-RESOURCES-001)

exception.message: Method SubsystemsTests.subsystemsCollectionReturns200()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.subsystems.SubsystemsTests@d7425e5] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: subsystemHasParentSystemLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/subsystem: /systems/{parentId}/subsystems/{id} links contain rel=parent referencing parent system (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-PARENT-LINK-001 — UNIQUE-to-Subsystems architectural invariant)

exception.message: Method SubsystemsTests.subsystemHasParentSystemLink()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.subsystems.SubsystemsTests@d7425e5] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: subsystemItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-endpoint: GET /systems/{parentId}/subsystems/{id} has id+type+links per inherited canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-CANONICAL-001)

exception.message: Method SubsystemsTests.subsystemItemHasIdTypeLinks()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.subsystems.SubsystemsTests@d7425e5] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: subsystemItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-url: /systems/{parentId}/subsystems/{id} links contain rel=canonical (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-CANONICAL-URL-001 — preserves v1.0 GH#3 fix)

exception.message: Method SubsystemsTests.subsystemItemHasCanonicalLink()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.subsystems.SubsystemsTests@d7425e5] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: proceduresCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/resources-endpoint: GET /procedures returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-RESOURCES-001)

exception.message: Method ProceduresTests.proceduresCollectionReturns200()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.procedures.ProceduresTests@2771815a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: procedureItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/canonical-url: /procedures/{id} links contain rel=canonical (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-CANONICAL-URL-001)

exception.message: Method ProceduresTests.procedureItemHasCanonicalLink()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.procedures.ProceduresTests@2771815a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: procedureItemsHaveNoGeometry
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/location: every /procedures item has geometry=null (Procedure SHALL NOT include geometry) (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-LOCATION-001 — UNIQUE-to-Procedures)

exception.message: Method ProceduresTests.procedureItemsHaveNoGeometry()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.procedures.ProceduresTests@2771815a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: procedureItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/canonical-endpoint: GET /procedures/{id} has id+type+links per canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-CANONICAL-001)

exception.message: Method ProceduresTests.procedureItemHasIdTypeLinks()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.procedures.ProceduresTests@2771815a] depends on not successfully finished methods in group "systemfeatures"

test-method.name: apiDefinitionResourceReturnsContent
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/oas30/oas-impl: api-definition resource resolves to HTTP 200 with non-empty body (REQ-ETS-CORE-004, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-RESOURCE-SHAPE-001)

test-method.name: conformanceResourceShapeIsObject
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance resource is a JSON object (REQ-ETS-CORE-004, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-RESOURCE-SHAPE-001)

test-method.name: landingPageReturnsHttp200
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page (GET /) returns HTTP 200 (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageReturnsJson
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page body is parseable JSON (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageHasLinks
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page body has a links array (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageDoesNotRequireSelfRel
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page does NOT require rel=self (sentinel — preserves v1.0 GH#3 fix; SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LINKS-NORMATIVE-001)

test-method.name: landingPageHasApiDefinitionLink
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/api-definition-success: landing page links contain rel=service-desc OR rel=service-doc (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-API-DEF-FALLBACK-001)

test-method.name: landingPageHasConformanceLink
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: landing page links contain rel=conformance (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: systemsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/resources-endpoint: GET /systems returns HTTP 200 (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: systemsDiscoverableViaCollectionsOrLandingPage
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/collections: /systems is discoverable via /collections OR landing-page rel=systems link (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-COLLECTIONS-001)

exception.message: Method SystemFeaturesTests.systemsDiscoverableViaCollectionsOrLandingPage()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.systemfeatures.SystemFeaturesTests@44abcfcf] depends on not successfully finished methods

test-method.name: systemsCollectionHasItemsArray
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/resources-endpoint: /systems body has non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LANDING-001)

exception.message: Method SystemFeaturesTests.systemsCollectionHasItemsArray()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.systemfeatures.SystemFeaturesTests@44abcfcf] depends on not successfully finished methods

test-method.name: systemItemHasGeometryOrValidTime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/location-time: /systems/{id} has validTime OR geometry (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LOCATION-TIME-001 — MAY-priority)

exception.message: Method SystemFeaturesTests.systemItemHasGeometryOrValidTime()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.systemfeatures.SystemFeaturesTests@44abcfcf] depends on not successfully finished methods

test-method.name: systemItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-endpoint: GET /systems/{id} has id+type+links per base resource shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-RESOURCE-SHAPE-001)

exception.message: Method SystemFeaturesTests.systemItemHasIdTypeLinks()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.systemfeatures.SystemFeaturesTests@44abcfcf] depends on not successfully finished methods

test-method.name: systemsCollectionLinksDiscipline
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-url: /systems/{id} links contain rel=canonical; absence of rel=self is NOT FAIL (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LINKS-NORMATIVE-001 — preserves v1.0 GH#3 fix)

exception.message: Method SystemFeaturesTests.systemsCollectionLinksDiscipline()[pri:0, instance:org.opengis.cite.ogcapiconnectedsystems10.conformance.systemfeatures.SystemFeaturesTests@44abcfcf] depends on not successfully finished methods

test-method.name: commonCollectionsEndpointReturnsCollectionsArray
test-method.description: OGC-20-024 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-2/0.0/req/collections/collections-list-success: /collections returns 200 with collections array (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-COLLECTIONS-001)

test-method.name: commonConformanceDeclaresCommonCore
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance conformsTo declares OGC API Common Part 1 Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: commonContentNegotiationHonoursFJsonParameter
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/json/content: GET /?f=json returns JSON (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-CONTENT-NEGOTIATION-001)

test-method.name: commonLandingPageConformanceLinkHasJsonType
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/json/definition: landing-page rel=conformance link has type attribute identifying JSON (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-LANDING-001)
